creator: bodek@blurp.org
text:
I have similar problem - htop shows only first letters 
of process numbers, or other words, I think.
FreBBSD 8.2-RELEASE.

Under FreeBSD 6.4-RELEASE htop works fine.

Details on http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IWyi91vJReA
Effects are identical under terminal and terminal emulators
(KDE konsole, on this video)

-- 
Bodek
